idea: Tech sector volume spike after 3-day price dip

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily prices and volume for XLK through price_only adapter

behavior: After a 3-day consecutive decline in XLK price, a sudden volume surge signals a potential short-term rebound.

market_impact.rationale: High volume after brief selloff often indicates institutional buying in tech.

trade_logic.entry: If XLK price falls 3 days in a row and on day 4 volume increases by 50% vs 10-day average
trade_logic.exit: After 7 trading days or price gains 5%, whichever comes first

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: 3-day pullbacks followed by volume spikes occur regularly in tech ETFs.

idea: Consumer discretionary weekly Google Trends surge

data.source: Google Trends weekly data for 'shopping' and 'discount' keywords mapped to XLY

behavior: Sharp weekly upticks in shopping-related searches often precede increased consumer discretionary spending.

market_impact.rationale: Rising consumer interest in deals signals potential revenue growth for discretionary retailers.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly search interest for 'shopping' increases 15% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: After 3 weeks or when search interest reverts below 5% increase

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Consumer search trends fluctuate seasonally and can spike multiple times monthly.

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily XLRE prices and 10-day realized volatility via price_only adapter

behavior: A sudden jump in XLRE price volatility often signals a rapid directional move in energy-related real estate investments.

market_impact.rationale: Volatility spikes can indicate energy price shocks impacting the sector positively.

trade_logic.entry: If 10-day realized volatility of XLE increases more than 30% compared to prior 20-day average
trade_logic.exit: After 10 trading days or 7% price gain

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Energy volatility surges frequently on geopolitical or supply news.

data.source: Yahoo Finance weekly prices for XLF via price_only adapter

behavior: After a weekly drawdown exceeding 4%, XLF often experiences a short-term rebound the following week.

market_impact.rationale: Banks and finance stocks tend to mean revert after sharp weekly declines.

trade_logic.entry: If XLF weekly return < -4%, enter long next week

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly declines >4% happen multiple times annually in financials.

data.source: USGS earthquake_activity weekly counts near US industrial hubs mapped to XLI

behavior: Increased moderate earthquake activity near industrial centers correlates with short-term supply chain disruptions, causing volatility.

market_impact.rationale: Earthquake shocks can disrupt manufacturing and logistics, pressuring industrial stocks.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly earthquake count near top 5 US industrial metro areas increases 50% week-over-week

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Earthquake activity fluctuates enough to trigger spikes multiple times yearly.

idea: Healthcare sector Google Trends flu surge

data.source: Google Trends weekly 'flu symptoms' searches mapped to XLV

behavior: Rising flu-related search interest can predict increased healthcare service demand and pharmaceutical sales.

market_impact.rationale: Seasonal illness surges drive higher healthcare utilization and product demand.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly flu-related search interest rises >20% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: After 4 weeks or search interest normalizes

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Flu season spikes annually and affects healthcare demand predictably.

idea: Consumer staples sudden volume surge after price consolidation

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily prices and volume for XLP via price_only adapter

behavior: After 7 days of narrow price range, a volume spike often precedes breakout moves in consumer staples.

market_impact.rationale: Volume surges following consolidation indicate renewed buying interest in defensive stocks.

trade_logic.entry: If XLP daily range <0.5% for 7 days and volume on day 8 > 120% of 20-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Price consolidations and volume spikes happen regularly in staples sector.

idea: Utilities sector weekly temperature drop signal

data.source: Open-Meteo daily temperature for US regions weighted to XLU holdings

behavior: A steep weekly temperature decline often drives higher utility demand, boosting utility stock performance.

market_impact.rationale: Colder weather increases heating demand, benefiting utilities.

trade_logic.entry: If average weekly temperature drops >5°F compared to prior week

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weather fluctuations causing demand shifts occur regularly through seasons.

idea: Real estate sector weekly Google Trends home buying surge

data.source: Google Trends weekly 'house for sale' and 'mortgage rates' search interest mapped to XLRE

behavior: Sharp rises in home-buying related searches often precede increased real estate market activity.

market_impact.rationale: Higher search interest signals potential rise in housing demand and prices.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly combined search interest for 'house for sale' and 'mortgage rates' rises >15% week-over-week

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Homebuying interest fluctuates seasonally and can spike multiple times yearly.

idea: Communications sector RSS news count spike

data.source: RSS feed counts of major telecom and media news mentions mapped to XLC weekly

behavior: Sudden jumps in news volume around communications companies often precede volatility and price moves.

market_impact.rationale: Increased news flow signals potential corporate developments or earnings surprises.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly RSS news mentions rise >40% compared to prior 4-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Communications news volume fluctuates often with corporate activity.

idea: Basic materials sector price momentum reversal

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily prices for XLB using price_only adapter

behavior: After a 7-day positive momentum streak exceeding 6%, XLB often pulls back sharply before resuming trend.

market_impact.rationale: Sharp momentum runs are frequently followed by short-term corrections in materials.

trade_logic.entry: If XLB gains >6% over past 7 days, enter short next day

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Momentum overextensions happen regularly in materials sector.

idea: Electric vehicle charger count surge impacts tech sector

data.source: OpenChargeMap daily EV charger counts combined with XLK prices

behavior: Rapid daily increases in EV charging infrastructure correlate with tech sector bullishness due to EV tech exposure.

market_impact.rationale: Growth in EV infrastructure signals expanding tech adoption in automotive and energy.

trade_logic.entry: If daily EV charger count increases >2% vs prior day for 3 consecutive days
trade_logic.exit: After 7 trading days or 4% XLK gain

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: EV charger buildouts have ongoing daily growth with occasional surges.

data.source: Yahoo Finance weekly price and volume for XLY via price_only adapter

behavior: When price drops more than 3% but volume increases 20% week-over-week, a reversal bounce often follows.

market_impact.rationale: Divergence often signals capitulation and institutional accumulation.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly price return < -3% and volume > 120% of prior 4-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Volume-price divergences appear multiple times yearly in consumer discretionary.

idea: Financial sector weekly Fed funds rate surprise reaction

data.source: FRED series weekly effective federal funds rate vs market consensus for XLF

behavior: If the Fed funds rate surprises above expectations, financial stocks often rally sharply the following week.

market_impact.rationale: Higher rates improve bank net interest margins boosting financials.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly effective Fed funds rate > consensus by 5bps

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Fed funds rate movements occur regularly with monetary policy updates.

idea: Industrial sector weekly container port volume drop

data.source: Port container volume weekly data from major US ports mapped to XLI

behavior: Significant weekly declines in container throughput correlate with short-term industrial stock weakness.

market_impact.rationale: Lower port volumes indicate supply chain slowdowns affecting industrial output.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly container volume drops >10% week-over-week

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Port volume fluctuates with economic cycles and shipping disruptions.
